title: Re-resolve licenses on every dependency bump
description: Treat a version change as a potential license change, because projects relicense between releases.
body: Use when upgrading, adding, or transitively pulling a new dependency version. Do not assume a package keeps the same license across versions (e.g. relicensing from open to BSL/SSPL, or dual-license changes). Actions: on any lockfile change, diff the resolved license of each changed component against the prior inventory and surface every license delta for review. Validation signals include a CI gate that compares the new inventory to the committed baseline and fails on any unreviewed license change. Risk boundary: a silent move to a source-available or non-OSI license (BSL, SSPL, Elastic) is blocking and must reach a human before merge.
